label: Active LP Dashboard
description: Concentrated liquidity position tracker with TVL, fees earned, impermanent loss, and in-range status.

0.5.note: no lib/mocks imports — data via useStrategiesData().

0.8.note: — context does not expose an error field; TableWidget supports error prop but has nothing to bind; WidgetErrorBoundary covers thrown exceptions; context falls back to mock data silently on API error — no data-level error surface needed.

l0.notes: 0.1 ✓ WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper. 0.2 ✓ requiredEntitlements=[execution-basic,execution-full]. 0.3 ✓ availableOn=[strategies,defi]. 0.4 ✓ no any/ts-ignore. 0.5 ✓ no lib/mocks imports — data via useStrategiesData(). 0.6 ✓ isLoading forwarded to TableWidget skeleton. 0.7 ✓ emptyMessage='No LP positions'. 0.8 NOTED — context does not expose an error field; TableWidget supports error prop but has nothing to bind; WidgetErrorBoundary covers thrown exceptions; context falls back to mock data silently on API error — no data-level error surface needed. 0.9 ✓ no dead code.

1.1.note: lpPositions sourced exclusively from useStrategiesData() hook.

1.2.note: context calls useGlobalScope() and filters strategies by org/client/strategy cascade.

1.3.note: org filter changes strategy data set.

1.6.note: empty scope arrays return unfiltered dataset (DEFAULT_STRATEGIES).

1.7.note: LP position mock data lives in strategies-data-context.tsx (not in lib/mocks/).

l1.notes: 1.1 ✓ lpPositions sourced exclusively from useStrategiesData() hook. 1.2 ✓ context calls useGlobalScope() and filters strategies by org/client/strategy cascade. 1.3 ✓ org filter changes strategy data set. 1.4 ✓ client cascade wired via getClientIdsForOrgs. 1.5 ✓ strategy filter wired via getStrategyIdsForScope. 1.6 ✓ empty scope arrays return unfiltered dataset (DEFAULT_STRATEGIES). 1.7 ✓ LP position mock data lives in strategies-data-context.tsx (not in lib/mocks/).

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

findings: 0.8 NOTE: strategies-data-context does not surface API error field. Context silently falls back to mock data on error. WidgetErrorBoundary handles thrown exceptions. TableWidget error prop is available but unused — acceptable given current context design.
Previously known issue resolved: data was inline MOCK_LP_POSITIONS; now sourced from strategies-data-context via useStrategiesData().
